text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, lil' buddy! There's no need to be scared! If
you come out, I'll give ya a big ol' hug!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And I'll give you some dried sardines that will
bless you with great fortune if you can eat them
in one bite!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm... We're not making much progress, are we?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello there. We're looking for a calico cat
with a red collar. Have you seen one around?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Aw, that's a shame... The thing is, someone who
lives around here stopped by earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
They think their pet cat might have wandered
onto our campus and gotten lost.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, are you sure? Thank you for being so
kind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to split up to better cover more
ground.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Meat is life! Everything's nice and grilled up for
ya, so c'mon out, ya hungry kitty!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woiya... haiya... Mewity meowsies, show me the
toe bean tracksies!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eureka! "The lost cat can be found in the east!" To
the east I gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the others employ their own tactics to find
the cat, I decide to return to the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you again. Are you well?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, I figured the best way to discover where a
cat might be hiding is to become like a cat. ♪
choice_data_list: It's probably somewhere it feels safe.
Maybe it's looking for a fun place to hang?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but of course. The cat isn't used to this
environment, so she's probably feeling terribly
anxious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let's search for places that are likely to make a
cat feel safe. We're one step closer to finding
her! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Exactly what kind of place would a cat feel safe
in, though?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright falls into deep thought again. I
decide to continue searching on my own,
periodically returning to check on her progress.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely. For all we know, the cat might be in a
wonderfully playful mood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The academy has all types of facilities. It must
feel like an amusement park to the little feline.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If the academy were an amusement park... Oh! I
just had an idea. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I should try to remember how I felt the first time
my father took me to his amusement park so I can
really get into the right mindset.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright falls into deep thought again. I
decide to continue searching on my own,
periodically returning to check on her progress.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, butter me an' call me a biscuit. I figured one
whiff o' this juicy slab o' meat would send a
hungry kitten scamperin' out here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe my pawprint dowsing took me in
circles...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's starting to get dark. I think we should head
back to the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! Look who it is over there! Howdy, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Taiki! Shhhh! Look at who's sitting by Bright's
feet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. Just where could the little kitty have
gone?

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Mew! Purr, purr...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all look, and right at Mejiro Bright's feet is a
calico cat with a red collar, rolling about happily
on its back!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no mistaking it! That's got to be the cat
we've been searching for! Bright seems
completely oblivious to its presence, though...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I know! Let's try to catch her attention with hand
gestures so we don't frighten the lil' kitty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my... Is that Fukukitaru and Taiki over there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And they're waving at me. Hehe, hello again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
How strange... They're gesticulating quite
enthusiastically for a simple greeting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Maybe they're not saying hello but
gesturing something at me? They want me... to
look down?

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh myyy. If it isn't a little kitty. ♪ Good day to
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. And you're a calico. That red collar of
yours really suits you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Huh? A red collar... on a calico cat... Where have
I heard that description before?

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Stretch...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Oh my. I just remembered. I've been looking for
you.

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Step, step, step, step.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I should pick her up so I can bring her back to—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where did she go?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Bright! The cat is getting away!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We gotta chase after her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them dash after the fleeing cat and
thankfully capture it!
